overview: IndiShield is a legal assessment tool that helps Indian policyholders evaluate the strength of their fire insurance claims before filing. It uses a structured scoring engine backed by real NCDRC/SCDRC case law to deliver a legally grounded claim strength score, denial risk breakdown, and strategic next steps.
features: Server-side scoring engine with free-text modifier (±10 pts)
Claim Strength Score (0–100) with STRONG/MODERATE/WEAK bands
Denial Ground Risk Matrix with severity indicators
Case Law Matching from 10 landmark Indian court decisions
Strategic Next Steps with actionable legal guidance
Per-user assessment history via Internet Identity login
Resources page with full methodology and statute references
